caption: Deeper battlefield: the field grew from 1600x1000 to 1600x1200 and the default deployment gap from 400 to 580 wu (29 m) -- the deepest deployment that keeps both armies at close-tier per-soldier fidelity from the first tick -- so the armies open at roughly 20 m front to front instead of 11 m, visibly two forces approaching rather than a brawl already in progress. The showcase battle now opens both lines advancing to meet mid-field (the player line carries its own move orders), pressing into melee, and one side breaking.
